title: Let’s Make Some More!
detail_text: <:th_ch0208/>It’s done~! Fufu, it looks like they came out well.<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0105/>Ahh, they smell amazing!<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0208/>Now, it’s decoration time.<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0105/>I’ve prepared more than enough frosting!<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0208/>Let’s get making 𝅘𝅥𝅮<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0105/>I looked up how to decorate cupcakes for Halloween on the internet, and there are so many different ways to do it. I think we should make the frosting a more eye-catching color......<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0208/>Mhmm...... Should we add this, then!?<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0105/>Let’s do it! It’ll be red velvet frosting!<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0208/>......Before we do that, should we give it a little taste test?<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0105/>Taste testing is a privilege of being a chef~ Don’t mind if I do!<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0000/>Translated by SIFAStheatre and Idol Story<:dt_line_end/>
